author: Viggo Meesters
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Open .log files as a read-only viewer with filters, timestamps, severity badges, and raw source.

manifest.author: Viggo Meesters
manifest.description: Open .log files as a read-only viewer with filters, timestamps, severity badges, and raw source.
manifest.name: Log Viewer

name: Log Viewer

releases.author: viggomeesters
